snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Size Zero 
Original Movie Name: Size Zero in Telugu
StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan 
Music:- M. M. Keeravani
Producer:- Prasad V Potluri
Director:- Prakash Kovelamudi

Disclaimer:- We are only the right holders of this content. Any opinions expressed in this Film may purely be of the director or the original producers but are not our personal opinions and we do not assume any responsibility or liability for the same.

Herne Katha relies on our audience to continue our unique and creative storytelling. You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
ūüôŹ Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ Herne Katha ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on 1st and 15th of every month on YouTube. 


ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ Production Team ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ
ūüé• Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (https://www.facebook.com/jeevan.rijal.58)

ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ Share your Story ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ For Advertisers ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


ūüďļūüďļūüďļ For Broadcasters ūüďļūüďļūüďļ
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ For Singers and Musicians ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


ūüé®ūüé®ūüé® For all Creatives ūüé®ūüé®ūüé®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ Sorry ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


ūüé®ūüé®ūüé® For all Creatives ūüé®ūüé®ūüé®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ Sorry ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Thalaivi | Official Trailer (Hindi) | Kangana Ranaut | Arvind Swamy | Vijay | 23rd April
snippet.description:
The superstar heroine, the queen of romance and the one who rose to power despite a patriarchal political system. 
The story we all know, the life story we don‚Äôt know. 
#Thalaivi, Releasing on 23rd April!

Starring Kangana Ranaut, Arvind Swamy, Nassar, Bhagyashree, Raj Arjun, Madhu Bala

Director: Vijay

Producers: Vishnu Vardhan Induri & Shaailesh R Singh

Co Producers: Hitesh Thakkar & Thirumal Reddy

DOP: Vishal Vittal

Music: G.V. Prakash Kumar

Creative Producer: Brinda Prasad

#Thalaivi, Releasing on 23rd April!

Starring Kangana Ranaut, Arvind Swamy, Nassar, Bhagyashree, Raj Arjun, Madhu Bala

Director: Vijay

Producers: Vishnu Vardhan Induri & Shaailesh R Singh

Co Producers: Hitesh Thakkar & Thirumal Reddy

DOP: Vishal Vittal

Music: G.V. Prakash Kumar

Creative Producer: Brinda Prasad

snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment Presents New Nepali Song 2077/2021 Dalli Resham By Melina Rai & Pratap Das Featuring with Pooja Sharma & Paul Shah Only On S3K Entertainment Official Youtube. 
Melina Rai is a very popular and rising Nepalese singer. She received the Best Playback Singer Female award at the Radio Kantipur Awards 2017. She is most recognized for the songs 'Kutu ma Kutu', 'Sirai ma Sirbandi' and 'Kammar Mathi Patuki'. Pratap Das is a young and very talented rising singing star in Nepal. He is famous for second runner-up of Nepal ideal season one. Featuring Artists Paul Shah is well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film and music industry. And Pooja Sharma is also a very talented rising Nepali actress in the Nepalese film and Music industry as well.

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra‚Äôs sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

snippet.title: The Stolen Necklace | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: The Big Bull: Official Trailer | Abhishek B, Ileana D, Nikita D, Sohum S | Kookie Gulati | 8th April
snippet.description:
This was not just another scam... it was the mother of all scams! Presenting the official trailer of #TheBigBull, starring Abhishek. A. Bachchan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nikita Dutta, Soham Shah, Ram Kapoor, Supriya Pathak, Saurabh Shukla and Mahesh Manjrekar in a special appearance. The film is set to releasing on 8th April 2021.

Director: Kookie Gulati
Produced by: Ajay Devgn & Anand Pandit

CEO: Meena K Iyer

Herne Katha relies on our audience to continue our unique and creative storytelling. You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
ūüôŹ Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ Herne Katha ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on 1st and 15th of every month on YouTube. 


ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ Production Team ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ
ūüé• Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (https://www.facebook.com/jeevan.rijal.58)
ūüé• Camera Assistant - Ashma Adhikari
Producer - Asha Thapa
ūüĎ© Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (https://twitter.com/cbidhya)
ūüé¨ Director - Kamal Kumar (https://twitter.com/qamalqumar)


ūüĎćūüĎćūüĎć Follow Herne Katha ūüĎćūüĎćūüĎć
ūüĎČ IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
ūüĎČ Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Website: https://hernekatha.com


ūüĆéūüĆéūüĆé Make our Episodes Global ūüĆéūüĆéūüĆé
Please contribute English (or any other language) subtitles to our video: http://bit.ly/hernekathasubs    


ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ Share your Story ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ For Advertisers ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


ūüďļūüďļūüďļ For Broadcasters ūüďļūüďļūüďļ
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ For Singers and Musicians ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


ūüé®ūüé®ūüé® For all Creatives ūüé®ūüé®ūüé®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ Sorry ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ Production Team ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ
ūüé• Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (https://www.facebook.com/jeevan.rijal.58)
ūüé• Camera Assistant - Ashma Adhikari
Producer - Asha Thapa
ūüĎ© Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (https://twitter.com/cbidhya)
ūüé¨ Director - Kamal Kumar (https://twitter.com/qamalqumar)


ūüĎćūüĎćūüĎć Follow Herne Katha ūüĎćūüĎćūüĎć
ūüĎČ IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
ūüĎČ Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Website: https://hernekatha.com


ūüĆéūüĆéūüĆé Make our Episodes Global ūüĆéūüĆéūüĆé
Please contribute English (or any other language) subtitles to our video: http://bit.ly/hernekathasubs    


ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ Share your Story ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ For Advertisers ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


ūüďļūüďļūüďļ For Broadcasters ūüďļūüďļūüďļ
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ For Singers and Musicians ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


ūüé®ūüé®ūüé® For all Creatives ūüé®ūüé®ūüé®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ Sorry ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Best Of CID | ŗ§łŗ•Äŗ§Üŗ§ąŗ§°ŗ•Ä | Clustrophobia | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP Pradyuman‚Äôs childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandson‚Äôs kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ą || Holi Special || Ep.-695 ||March-23-2021|| Peter Khaling || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Everyone is looking to have some fun and enjoy the festival of colors Holi. Bokre has some special guests, watch their interactions with the people in the village on today's episode

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta

Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya
Title song Writer: Shankar Adhikari 
Music/Singer: Chetan Sapkota 
Guest Artist: Peter Khaling, Sheshuka Rai
Artists: Surbir Pandit, Ramchandra Adhikari, Daman Rupakheti,  Surendra K.C, Palpasa Dangol, Suraj Chapagain, Januka Poudel, Niru Khadka, Tika bhakta Jirel, Ratna Prajapati, Lekhant Bhusal(Lekharaj), Diwakar Bhandari, Madhu Acharya, Krishna Joshi, Dhanaram Muskan, Sarswoti Fuyal, Dharma Prasad Bhattarai and many more.

snippet.title: Splitsvilla Season 13 | The Girls Meet The Boys | Ep. 01 | Highlights
snippet.description:
Nikhil gets the golden arrow from Riya. Gary gets the golden arrow from Avantika. Samruddhi chooses Kevin for her golden arrow. Azma gives her silver arrow to Shivam. Dhruv gets Palak's silver arrow. When the sticking game ends, Kevin comes out with the most number of arrows.

#SplitsvillaSeason13

snippet.title: ŗ§ģ ŗ§ģŗ§įŗ•áŗ§į ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§Čŗ§Āŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§§ŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§łŗ•Äŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§§ ŗ§łŗ§ßŗ•ą ŗ§įŗ§Ļŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§õ ŗ§®ŗ§Ņ ! - Manisha Koirala | TAMASOMA JYOTIRGAMAYA | AP1HD
snippet.description:
Tamasoma Jyotirgamaya is one of the most popular television talk shows in the nation. As the name suggests it is an effort to explore the true knowledge on the national and international affairs that matter to the communities and the human race as a whole. The guests of the shows include top political leaderships and renowned figures from different walks of life, mostly associated with the contested affairs. The host of the show is Mr. Tikaram Yatri, the editor-in-chief of AP1HD Television. The broadcast time of the show is Monday (9 to 10 PM).

ŗ§Źŗ§™ŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§ü ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§ē ŗ§łŗ•čŗ§ģŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ•Į ŗ§¨ŗ§úŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§£ ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ§ģŗ§łŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§óŗ§ģŗ§Į ŗ§łŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§ē ŗ§łŗ•čŗ§ö,ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§≠ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§į ŗ§Čŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§Ėŗ•čŗ§úŗ•Ä ŗ§óŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§öŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§§ ŗ§üŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§úŗ§® ŗ§Öŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•č ŗ•§ ŗ§úŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§≠ŗ•čŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ§áŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§¨ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§Üŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ§Ņŗ§ē ŗ§įŗ§āŗ§óŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§áŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§£ŗ•Ä ŗ§Įŗ§ł ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ģŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ•ą ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ•áŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§ě ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•áŗ§∑ŗ§ē ŗ§§ŗ§•ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Čŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ§įŗ§£ŗ•Äŗ§Į ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§ą ŗ§Öŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§•ŗ§Ņŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§įŗ•āŗ§™ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§Čŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§óŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§õ ŗ•§ ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§üŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§į ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ•ą ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§Ěŗ•Ćŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§óŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§ł ŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§Üŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§ú ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§Ėŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§§ ŗ§óŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§®ŗ•Ā ŗ§Įŗ§ł ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ģŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§Ėŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§Čŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§Ļŗ•č ŗ•§

snippet.title: Splitsvilla Season 13 | The Greek Gods On The Beach | Ep. 01 | Highlights
snippet.description:
Nikita and Arushi go first with their gold and silver arrows to choose their men. 'An old school lover' phrase catches Arushi's eyes. That young man turns out to be Vyomesh and he gets the golden arrow from Arushi. Nikita chooses Kevin and gives him a silver arrow. Trevon gets the golden arrow from Nikita and Saamartya gets the silver one from Arushi.

#SplitsvillaSeason13

The Man Who Died Once
Two families from different parts of Nepal, unknown to each other, are connected by a fatal road accident in Saudi Arabia. 'Marisakeko Manchhe' (The Man Who Died Once) is a story of life and death, unimaginable sorrows, surprises and some measure of comfort and happiness.

Best Documentary Award Winner of Kathmandu International Mountain Film Festival (KIMFF 2018)

More articles and updates on this story can be found in the link below: https://ujyaaloonline.com/story/24135

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

snippet.title: Day Dreamer | Early Bird in Hindi-Urdu Episode 156 | Erkenci Kus | Turkish Dramas
snippet.description:
Daydreamer Episode 156 in Hindi Dubbed

Erkenci Kus - Day Dreamer - Early Bird All Sections ‚Üí https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6k9rnpOIGkc&list=PLcV4EBCzIde4e0PhB9b_7fZrJEfQJTybI

Sanem is an ambitious girl who dreams of becoming a great writer someday. However, her wings are cut when her family presents her with two choices. Her mother forces Salem to marry Muzzafar, their neighbour. The only way to avoid marriage is if Sanem finds herself a decent job. At such short notice, Salem starts working in an advertising firm. Not only that solves her problem at home but she also meets the love of her life at her new workplace. However, little does she know that she has walked right into a bigger trap. Will Sanem find a place for herself in the fancy corporate world? Will the glam of the corporate world make her turn a blind eye on her dream?

snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

en.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Lukaamaari [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
We identify love as a noun and we experience it as a verb. This song is one that speaks of love as an action rather than the decoration of an idea with words. When everything is a clich√© and every metaphor is mundane, the only way to truly communicate love is through action. As words escape our sights and play hide and seek with us, we discover new ways to speak love. "Lukaamaari" is the story of such a discovery.

___________________________________________________________________________

snippet.title: Day Dreamer | Early Bird in Hindi-Urdu Episode 155 | Erkenci Kus | Turkish Dramas
snippet.description:
Daydreamer Episode 155 in Hindi Dubbed

Erkenci Kus - Day Dreamer - Early Bird All Sections ‚Üí https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6k9rnpOIGkc&list=PLcV4EBCzIde4e0PhB9b_7fZrJEfQJTybI

Sanem is an ambitious girl who dreams of becoming a great writer someday. However, her wings are cut when her family presents her with two choices. Her mother forces Salem to marry Muzzafar, their neighbour. The only way to avoid marriage is if Sanem finds herself a decent job. At such short notice, Salem starts working in an advertising firm. Not only that solves her problem at home but she also meets the love of her life at her new workplace. However, little does she know that she has walked right into a bigger trap. Will Sanem find a place for herself in the fancy corporate world? Will the glam of the corporate world make her turn a blind eye on her dream? 

#DayDreamer #EarlyBird #ErkenciKus #Episode155 #TurkishSeries

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 07 March 2021 at 9:00 PM

Harke Haldar Team :

Artists : Bishnu Sapkota, Shivahari Bairagi (Nepal), Roshani Sapkota, Surendra K.C., Shiva Sharma, Indra Dong Lama, Saru Dahal, Anita Karki, Anju Rawali, Asmita Basnet, Padam Karki, Rajendra Giri, Yadu Dhital 
Writer : Shiva Sharma
Director: Bishnu Sapkota / Indra Dong Lama 
Media Partner : Online Suchana Pati 
Editor : Raaz Karki
Recording Studio : ManjuShree Studio
Title Vocal : Prakash Ojha 
Music : Basanta Sapkota

Legal Advisor : Naradmuni Pyakurel
Make-up : Sanjay Lama
Sport : Ram Saran Tamang

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 07 March 2021 at 9:00 PM

Harke Haldar Team :

Artists : Bishnu Sapkota, Shivahari Bairagi (Nepal), Roshani Sapkota, Surendra K.C., Shiva Sharma, Indra Dong Lama, Saru Dahal, Anita Karki, Anju Rawali, Asmita Basnet, Padam Karki, Rajendra Giri, Yadu Dhital

snippet.title: Panghat ‚Äď Roohi | Rajkummar ‚Äď Janhvi - Varun | Sachin- Jigar, Amitabh B | Asees Kaur
snippet.description:
Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin ‚Äď Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

Song ‚Äď Panghat 
Film - Roohi

Directed by: Hardik Mehta

Music by: Sachin-Jigar
A Jio Studios Release
By Maddock Films 

Lyrics :- 
JULMI BADI AUKAT PE YE RAAT AAYI HAIMANN TO HAI MERA PAWANMAGAR 
YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI

PANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTIPANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR

(ANTRA)
O SAIYAAN BAABUJI BUMBAIYATERI BUTTERFALAIYAKABSE BAITHI TERI RAAH TAAKE

DAAAIYA APNE PYAAR KI NAAIYABEECH BHAVAR MAI NAAIYAPAAR LAGA JOGAN KE BAAGH JAGE

O MERI FULJADIYO RESABAR ZARA KARIYO RE

HAANSABAR KARTE HUE KITNA BHARUUN MAIHANDPUMP SE MATKI

PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI

snippet.description:
Watch this Bollywood Hindi Action Movie "Nepali The Warrior" (dubbed from Tamil Superhit film "Nepali") starring Bharat, Meera Jasmine, Govind Namdeo. 

Synopsis-
The movie revolves around Karthik (Bharath), a software engineer. He comes across Priya (Meera Jasmine) in a hill station. After formal acquaintance, love blossoms between them.
As usual, the girl family protests their affair. Eventually, the couple walks out of the house and get married. They face trouble in the form of a greedy and sexual maniac police officer. He lusts on Priya. When he tries to molest her, she gets killed. The blame falls on Karthik.
He kills the police officer and goes to jail, where he meets a Nepali social worker (Govind Namdeo), who voices for women harassed in the workplace. Inspired by the Nepali, Karthik comes out of the prison to punish those who misbehave with women at the workplace. He bumps off a computer engineer, a professor and a doctor dressed as a Nepali youth.
DCP Gautham (Prem) takes up the task of cracking the serial murders. Does he manage to pin down Karthik forms the crux?
